New Lynn Standalone Commercial/Industrial

78 Delta Avenue, New Lynn

NZD $3,750,000

Deadline sale

Thursday

2:00pm

12 Mar

Property details

This unique property is situated within one of Auckland’s fastest-growing and multi-faceted suburbs and presents a compelling opportunity for add-value investors, owner-occupiers, and developers.

Excellent road frontage, parking and rear yard with separate access.

Located within an established and tightly held Auckland mixed-use industrial environment.

Existing improvements and Business – Light Industry zoning provides a range of repositioning or redevelopment opportunities.

1,261sqm (more or less) freehold site in the established New Lynn commercial precinct.

Improvements comprise two buildings, including a flexible 540 sqm clear-span factory/warehouse with office/amenities, dual roller door access, and a rear building of 180sqm, plus yard area.

Rear building currently leased on a month-by-month basis, providing holding income of $2,300 per month (GST inclusive).

Offered for sale by tender, closing 2pm, 12 March 2026, unless sold prior.

Photo Gallery

Highlights

  • ✓Standalone freehold industrial holding
  • ✓Add-value potential in tightly held location
  • ✓Holding income with flexible lease
  • ✓Strong fundamentals and location appeal

  • Floor Area720m²
  • Land Area1261m²
  • Title TypeFreehold
